reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)
Good prices, great service, and delicious food.

reviews.comment:
Buena atención, pero con larga fila para cargar combustibles, los empleados atendían con rapidez, pero los desborda la cantidad de turistas.

(Translated by Google)
Good service, but with a long line to fill up with gas. The employees were quick to serve, but they were overwhelmed by the number of tourists.

reviews.comment:
La atención es muy buena, pero hay cola a cualquier horario...

(Translated by Google)
The service is very good, but there's a queue at any time of day...
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1752873787390207331/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNodnBxUWN3EAE

reviews.comment:
Siempre menos personal qu el necesario. Dos cuadras de cola. Vas a la una de la mañana y un solo playero una cuadra de cola

(Translated by Google)
Always less staff than needed. Two blocks of line. You go at one in the morning and there's only one attendant, a block of line.

reviews.comment:
Es un lugar para cargar combustible e irte. Nada es atractivo a quedarse . Atención de playeros , regular , baños no tan limpios .

(Translated by Google)
It's a place to fill up and go. Nothing is compelling enough to stay. Beachgoers' service is average, and bathrooms aren't very clean.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1752873787390207331/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNoMXRMTG5nRRAB

reviews.comment:
Excelente servicio, tener encuenta que se pueden generar colas para la carga de combustible, aceptan pagar con debito

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service, keep in mind that there may be queues for refueling; they accept debit card payments.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1752873787390207331/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNocHMtaU1REAE

reviews.comment:
Muy bien la atención y los servicios, baños y sector de playa, accesible para personas con problemas de movilidad,  bien los precios del serviclub y agua para mate gratis (algo no tan común últimamente)

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service and amenities, restrooms and beach area, accessible for people with mobility issues, reasonable prices at the convenience store and free hot water for mate (something not so common these days)
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1752873787390207331/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNoalBYWmZBEAE
